headline: A Look At Walmart (WMT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Walmart (WMT) is on investors’ radar today Walmart (WMT) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, including a 0.6% gain over the past day, a 4.6% decline over the past month, and a 10.5% rise in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Walmart. At a share price of $125.12, Walmart’s recent 1 day and 90 day share price gains sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 44.46%, suggesting momentum has been building over a longer horizon despite some near term...
